I don't need to buy it right now because I know he'll run a sale Tomorrow and these tactics work for affiliate marketing as well If you don't have a discount you can always ask the creator to give you a discount with the benefit of you getting more sales for him And I don't think any creator could deny that that is good enough reason to Uh, be given a discount so promotional threads and replies If you don't want to promote directly on your timeline You can either wait until the tweet does well and then you can plug a promotional tweet Related to it so you can plug your email list your lead magnet Or just a course or offer that is related to the tweet And that usually results in a good amount of sales Of course depending on the size of your following And the other way is you can write a thread based on the offer's topic and plug tweets in between or at the end of the thread So if I wrote a thread on my twitter growth or just twitter growth tips, right?
